sec1Copy: Since 1996, we've been Idaho's trusted source for industrial-grade fasteners that go far beyond what you'll find at your average hardware store. Specializing in high-performance bolts, screws, and structural hardware, we proudly supply contractors, builders, and leading construction companies throughout the state.
From everyday bolts to hardened and structural grades, as well as a wide range of stainless options, we carry the quality and variety professionals rely on to get the job done right.

As a locally owned and operated company, we take pride in our Idaho roots and the long-standing relationships we've built with our customers. Whether you're tackling a major construction project or sourcing specialty hardware, our team is here to deliver dependable products and service you can count on.
brand.sec2Copy: We're proud to work with contractors, builders, and construction companies across Idaho, providing each account with the same personal care and attention to detail. Our team takes the time to understand every client's needs, hand-delivering orders with precision and reliability. We remember the details — from your preferred hardware to the demands of each project — and go above and beyond to make your job easier. Our commitment to service and relationships keep our partners coming back year after year.
aboutSec1Copy: Industrial Hardware Idaho has been proudly serving Idaho's construction, industrial, and contracting communities since 1996. For nearly three decades, we've built our reputation on supplying dependable, high-quality fasteners and specialty hardware that professionals can trust on every job.

We specialize in industrial-grade bolts, screws, nuts, washers, and structural hardware — including hardened, structural, and stainless options that go far beyond what you'll find at a typical hardware store. Whether you're sourcing everyday fasteners or hard-to-find specialty parts, our inventory is curated to meet the demands of real-world projects.

As a locally owned and operated business, we believe strong relationships matter just as much as strong materials. Our team takes the time to understand each customer's needs, from preferred product specs to delivery timelines, ensuring every order is accurate, reliable, and on time. Many of our customers have worked with us for years — a trust we don't take lightly.
At Industrial Hardware Idaho, we're more than a supplier. We're a partner in your work, committed to helping projects move forward efficiently, safely, and successfully.
contactSec1Copy: Have a question about a product, sourcing specialty hardware, or setting up an account? Our team is here to help.
Give us a call or reach out to us with the form below — we look forward to working with you.

copy: We believe great work environments are built on respect, trust, and consistency. Our team members play a critical role in keeping projects across Idaho moving forward — and we take that responsibility seriously.
We take pride in doing things right the first time. From warehouse to counter sales, teamwork matters.
We are always interested in meeting motivated individuals.
Experience in hardware or construction is a plus, but not required.
